MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Michelle Brant, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Development Corporation is present, represented by Abdolloh Dos.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Brown is present.
Attorney Taylor Pospichel appearing for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. Defendant has fallen ill. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 13, 2016 remains on calendar.
